violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit take out of service to be washed and sanitized.Ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

(Eggs) was observed held at (111) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165 or above. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (kitchen ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the (food storage shelves and food prep areas ) area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
Plastic containers were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be washed and sanitized. Ice disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

(Eggs) was observed held at (124) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the (beverage ) refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (kitchen area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
(Beverage cooler ) located in the (front counter ) area was not in good repair.Ambient temperatures observed at 49DF.PIC relocated milk products to another unit. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The floors and walls throughout the back kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the (food storage shelves ) area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The hand-washing sink in the service area was lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

An air gap is lacking at the ice machine. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The floors, especially under equipment, throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

Laminate shelving observed in poor repair, exposing base wood. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2023
1 door lowboy refrigerator gaskets by drive thru and ice bin were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023
